grant_title: European Maritime, Fisheries and Aquaculture Fund (EMFAF)
geographic_restrictions: EU Member States and associated countries (shared management) or direct EU funding (direct management)
project_area: Sustainable fisheries, aquaculture, maritime resources, marine biodiversity, blue economy, coastal community vitality, and maritime security
demographic_requirements: Projects must contribute to sustainable exploitation and management of aquatic and maritime resources, with a focus on small-scale coastal fisheries, generational renewal in the fishing sector, and socio-economic attractiveness of coastal communities.
eligibility_summary: Projects must align with the EU common fisheries policy, maritime policy, and international ocean governance goals. Applicants must follow national operational programme procedures and meet selection criteria and investment priorities. Eligibility is determined by national authorities managing the operational programme in each country.
